title: angelica ostruthium
intro: Angelica ostruthium, also known as Bear's Foot or Wild Angelica, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Angelica ostruthium include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in reducing fluid retention. Herbal preparations of Angelica ostruthium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
